title: Letter Stories - Social Links Configuration
description: Social media and contact links displayed as icon links in the site footer. Each property holds a URL string. If empty string, the icon is not rendered. Used in: Footer.js (via Social.js component).

facebook.description: Facebook profile URL. Rendered as Facebook icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

twitter.description: Twitter/X profile URL. Rendered as Twitter icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

linkedin.description: LinkedIn profile URL. Rendered as LinkedIn icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

pinterest.description: Pinterest profile URL. Rendered as Pinterest icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

instagram.description: Instagram profile URL. Rendered as Instagram icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

youtube.description: YouTube channel URL. Rendered as YouTube icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

github.description: GitHub profile URL. Rendered as GitHub icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

gitlab.description: GitLab profile URL. Rendered as GitLab icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

discord.description: Discord invite/server URL. Rendered as Discord icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

slack.description: Slack workspace URL. Rendered as Slack icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

medium.description: Medium profile URL. Rendered as Medium icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

codepen.description: CodePen profile URL. Rendered as CodePen icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

bitbucket.description: Bitbucket profile URL. Rendered as Bitbucket icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

dribbble.description: Dribbble profile URL. Rendered as Dribbble icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

behance.description: Behance profile URL. Rendered as Behance icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

soundcloud.description: SoundCloud profile URL. Rendered as SoundCloud icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

tumblr.description: Tumblr blog URL. Rendered as Tumblr icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

reddit.description: Reddit profile/subreddit URL. Rendered as Reddit icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

vk.description: VK (Vkontakte) profile URL. Rendered as VK icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp contact/number URL. Rendered as WhatsApp icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

snapchat.description: Snapchat profile URL. Rendered as Snapchat icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

vimeo.description: Vimeo profile URL. Rendered as Vimeo icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

tiktok.description: TikTok profile URL. Rendered as TikTok icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

foursquare.description: Foursquare profile URL. Rendered as Foursquare icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

rss.description: RSS feed URL. Rendered as RSS icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

email.description: Email address. Rendered as mail icon link (mailto:) in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

phone.description: Phone number. Rendered as phone icon link (tel:) in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

address.description: Location/map URL. Rendered as location pin icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

skype.description: Skype contact URL. Rendered as Skype icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.

website.description: Personal/company website URL. Rendered as globe icon link in Social.js. Used in Footer.js.
